quotes.quote: The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: I can do all things through Christ which strengtheneth me.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: For God hath not given us the spirit of fear; but of power, and of love, and of a sound mind.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: The joy of the Lord is your strength.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Be still, and know that I am God.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: The Lord is nigh unto them that are of a broken heart.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Commit thy way unto the Lord; trust also in him; and he shall bring it to pass.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: The Lord shall fight for you, and ye shall hold your peace.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Trust in the Lord with all thine heart; and lean not unto thine own understanding.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: In all thy ways acknowledge him, and he shall direct thy paths.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Casting all your care upon him; for he careth for you.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: The Lord is my light and my salvation; whom shall I fear?
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Weeping may endure for a night, but joy cometh in the morning.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: The steps of a good man are ordered by the Lord: and he delighteth in his way.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Create in me a clean heart, O God; and renew a right spirit within me.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Thy word is a lamp unto my feet, and a light unto my path.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: This is the day which the Lord hath made; we will rejoice and be glad in it.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: He healeth the broken in heart, and bindeth up their wounds.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: The Lord is good unto them that wait for him, to the soul that seeketh him.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: They that wait upon the Lord shall renew their strength.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Fear thou not; for I am with thee: be not dismayed; for I am thy God.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: No weapon that is formed against thee shall prosper.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Call unto me, and I will answer thee, and shew thee great and mighty things, which thou knowest not.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: I will restore to you the years that the locust hath eaten.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Seek ye first the kingdom of God, and his righteousness; and all these things shall be added unto you.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Come unto me, all ye that labour and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: With God all things are possible.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Peace I leave with you, my peace I give unto you.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Ye shall know the truth, and the truth shall make you free.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: If the Son therefore shall make you free, ye shall be free indeed.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: We are more than conquerors through him that loved us.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Be ye transformed by the renewing of your mind.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Walk by faith, not by sight.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: My grace is sufficient for thee: for my strength is made perfect in weakness.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Stand fast therefore in the liberty wherewith Christ hath made us free.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Let us not be weary in well doing: for in due season we shall reap, if we faint not.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: For we are his workmanship, created in Christ Jesus unto good works.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Being confident of this very thing, that he which hath begun a good work in you will perform it.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Let the peace of God rule in your hearts.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.quote: Let us run with patience the race that is set before us.
quotes.author: Bible
